description: Heavy rainfall has caused flash flooding. An operator must manage the disaster response.

nodes.task_description: Identify flooded areas using data from street-level water sensors and camera analytics.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a map overlay of the flooded zones.

nodes.task_description: Automatically close flooded roads in the city's navigation and traffic systems.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the status of multiple roads to 'closed'.

nodes.task_description: Identify and dispatch high-water rescue vehicles to assist stranded citizens.

expected_outcome.value: Agent dispatches specialized units to the most critical areas.
